name: Orthex Oyj
summary: Orthex Oyj, a houseware company, designs, produces, and sells household products in Finland. The company offers sorting and recycling, water resistant storage, durable storage, colored and decorative storage, underbed storage, and food storage products, as well as storage boxes and baskets, and box inserts for easy organizing for room types, such as bedroom and closet, children√Ç¬¥s room, home office, garage and storage, cottage, boat and caravan, kitchen, and bathroom. It also provides kitchen products, including food storage, kitchen utensil, baking, and tableware products; home and yard products, such as laundry baskets, waste bins, buckets and tubs, bins, mailboxes, bird-feeding and baby bathroom products; and plant care products comprising pots, saucers, window boxes, watering cans, and sprayers, as well as bio and recycled materials. The company markets and sells its products under brands, such as SmartStore, GastroMax and Orthex, as well as K√É¬∂kskungen brands. Orthex Oyj also exports its products to Germany, France, and the United Kingdom. The company was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Espoo, Finland.
